docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHAPMAN, TRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHOWDERS INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAPMAN, TRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOWDERS INCORPORATED $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
